'''Shando''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Lirra]] once controlled by the [[Jhank Shel]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan until the [[Subjugation of Lirra|subjugation]] of the planet by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
